meta.name: UWES-9 Utrecht Work Engagement Scale
meta.description: The UWES-9 is a 9-item scale measuring three dimensions of work engagement: vigor, dedication, and absorption.
meta.author: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB (2003)
meta.reference: Schaufeli WB, Bakker AB, Salanova M. The measurement of work engagement with a short questionnaire. Educ Psychol Meas. 2006;66(4):701-716.
meta.instruction: The following statements are about how you feel at work. Please read each statement carefully and decide if you ever feel this way about your job.

commonChoices.label: Almost never (a few times a year or less)
Very often (a few times a week)

questions.text: At my work, I feel bursting with energy.
I find the work that I do full of meaning and purpose.
Time flies when I am working.
At my job, I feel strong and vigorous.
I am enthusiastic about my job.
When I am working, I forget everything else around me.
When I get up in the morning, I feel like going to work.
I feel happy when I am working intensely.

ranges.label: Low Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement level is low, indicating limited vigor, dedication, and absorption in your work. You may feel disconnected from your job, lacking enthusiasm and energy. This pattern can affect both productivity and job satisfaction over time.
suggestions: Reflect on whether your current role aligns with your personal values and career goals
Discuss potential work content adjustments or new responsibilities with your supervisor
Identify small aspects of your work that bring a sense of achievement or meaning

ranges.label: Moderate Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is at a moderate level, with some periods of energy and enthusiasm alongside times of disconnection. You have a reasonable foundation to build upon, and targeted strategies can help you reach a more consistently engaged state.
suggestions: Set challenging but achievable goals to create a sense of progress and mastery
Develop supportive social relationships with colleagues in your workplace
Seek more autonomy, skill variety, and growth opportunities in your role
Identify your peak energy periods and schedule meaningful work during those times
Celebrate small wins to build positive momentum and reinforce engagement

ranges.label: High Work Engagement
ranges.description: Your work engagement is high, reflecting strong vigor, dedication, and absorption. You find your work meaningful, feel energized by your tasks, and become deeply immersed in what you do. This level of engagement is associated with greater performance and well-being.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your high work engagement while monitoring for early signs of overwork
Be mindful of work-life balance to prevent burnout, as even passionate workers need recovery time
Share your positive energy and help colleagues enhance their own work engagement

vigor.label: Low Vigor
vigor.description: You lack energy and vitality at work, often feeling exhausted and unmotivated. Low vigor can impair your resilience to workplace challenges and reduce your willingness to invest effort in tasks.

vigor.label: Moderate Vigor
vigor.description: You have some energy at work, though it fluctuates throughout the day. Building physical health habits and optimizing your work schedule can help sustain more consistent energy levels.

vigor.label: High Vigor
vigor.description: You are full of energy, vitality, and mental resilience at work. You feel strong and willing to invest sustained effort, even when facing challenges. This robust energy fuels consistent high performance.

dedication.label: Low Dedication
dedication.description: You lack enthusiasm and identification with your work, possibly feeling it is meaningless or uninspiring. Low dedication can diminish your sense of purpose and reduce job satisfaction over time.

dedication.label: Moderate Dedication
dedication.description: You have some enthusiasm and commitment to your work, with room for growth. Finding deeper meaning in your tasks and connecting them to broader goals can strengthen your sense of dedication.

dedication.label: High Dedication
dedication.description: You are passionate and proud of your work, finding it highly meaningful and inspiring. High dedication reflects a strong sense of significance and challenge that keeps you deeply committed to your role.

absorption.label: Low Absorption
absorption.description: You find it difficult to concentrate at work and are easily distracted. Low absorption means you rarely experience a state of flow, which can limit both your productivity and your sense of fulfillment.

absorption.label: Moderate Absorption
absorption.description: You can maintain some focus at work, though occasional distractions pull you away. Reducing interruptions and creating a more structured work environment can help you achieve deeper concentration.

absorption.label: High Absorption
absorption.description: You are highly focused and immersed in your work, frequently entering a state of flow where time seems to pass quickly. This deep engagement allows you to produce your best work and experience genuine satisfaction.
